text:
Part D’s true out-of-pocket (TrOOP) requirement. Examples 
include payments by group health plans, worker's compensation, and governmental programs like the 
Veterans Administration and TRICARE. 
SHORT NAME: PLRO_AMT 
LONG NAME: PLRO_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
13 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
Field length expanded from 10 to 13 in 2025. This variable comes directly from the original PDE.
